nodes.label: Home Screen — Inactive State (Button Centered Layout)
nodes.description: Home tab in inactive/pre-session state. Shows blocked apps list (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X, Facebook) with toggle switches, ritual complements grid (Meditar, Leer, Estudiar, Respirar, Gratitud, Entrenar, Journaling, Visualizar, Caminar, Suplementos), and a centered CTA button 'Comenzar jornada · 15 min' in teal/green. Mentex Tweaks dev panel visible on right with Estado=Inactivo selected.

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks — Dev/Design Panel
nodes.description: Floating dev/design panel (Mentex Tweaks) used across all Home screen screenshots. Controls: AUTH (DEV) with navigation shortcuts (Welcome skip splash, Login screen), ESTADO toggle (Inactivo/Activo), ACENTO color picker (teal/primary), ESTILO DE CARDS (Glass/Lineas/Plano), TIPOGRAFÍA familia (Geist/Inter/Manrope). Used for rapid design iteration and state switching during development.

properties.purpose: Design/dev toggle panel for rapid state and style iteration

edges.note: Both are Home inactive state variants; button-centered shows ritual complements grid + centered CTA, home-inactive-view shows full onboarding with duration selector + principio card
State transition: Home inactive → Home active after 'Comenzar jornada' is tapped
Dev panel controlling Estado=Inactivo state for this screen
Both screens share Coach Mentex AI suggestions pattern — Home recommends rituals, Agenda recommends time blocks
